sections.subtitle: Recent Form Analysis
sections.text: Monza's form in the last 5 matches shows only one win (2-1 vs Udinese) with 4 losses, reflecting their struggle at the bottom of the table (20th, 18 points). Empoli, slightly better positioned (18th, 28 points), has also struggled with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses in their last 5 matches, indicating inconsistent performance.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: The last two head-to-head matches between Monza and Empoli resulted in a 0-0 draw (August 2024) and a 3-0 win for Empoli (January 2024). Historically, their encounters tend to have fewer goals, with under 2.5 goals in 5 of their last 7 meetings.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics Overview
sections.text: Monza has scored 27 goals (19th in the league) and conceded 64 (also 19th), showing defensive frailties. Empoli has scored 29 goals but conceded 56, slightly better defensively but still vulnerable, suggesting a low-scoring but competitive match.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Monza’s Dany Mota (5 goals) and Empoli’s Sebastiano Esposito (8 goals) are key attacking threats. However, both teams have multiple missing players, which could impact their ability to convert chances.

sections.subtitle: Match Conditions and Stats
sections.text: Given the referee’s average of 4.5 yellow cards per game, a physical game is likely. Both teams average low corner counts (Monza 3.5, Empoli similar), and recent trends suggest under 10.5 corners in matches.
